name: document_controller_log_incoming_document_received_from_external_party
desc: Logs a document received from an external party. Validates naming, checks for duplicates, records in the incoming document register.

parameters.name: receivedFromName
parameters.description: Name of the person sending the document

parameters.name: platformSource
parameters.description: Platform the document was received from (e.g. email, Asite, VFP)

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes about the incoming document
